question: What is the main ingredient in Plorgonian stew?

answers.ground_truth: fermented tubers of the Plorg plant
answers.original: The main ingredient in Plorgonian stew is fermented tubers of the Plorg plant.

entities.name: Plorgonian Stew
entities.description: Plorgonian stew is a dish made primarily from fermented tubers of the Plorg plant.

entities.name: Plorg Tuber
entities.description: Plorg tubers are the fermented base ingredient of Plorgonian stew and grow only in volcanic soil.

entities.name: Plorg Plant
entities.description: The Plorg plant is a botanical species whose tubers are used to make Plorgonian stew.

relations.description: Plorgonian tableware is used in the context of Plorgonian dining rituals.

The Plorg plant blooms once every decade.

Plorgonian dining rituals involve specific customs when eating Plorgonian stew.
